subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down by the All-Bountiful unto them that have believed in God, the Almighty, the Self-Subsisting, and it calleth all unto the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الوهاب لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم و انه یدع الکل الی الافق
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
